llm.title: Ask Ontos
llm.subtitle: Ask questions about data products, costs, and analytics
llm.disabledSubtitle: Natural language search is not currently enabled.
llm.disabledMessage: LLM search requires configuration. Please contact your administrator to enable this feature.
llm.welcomeTitle: How can I help you today?
llm.welcomeMessage: I can help you discover data products, understand business terms, analyze costs, and run analytics queries.
llm.inputPlaceholder: Ask a question about your data...
llm.inputHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line

examples.findCustomerData: Where can I find customer data?
examples.dataProductsCost: How much do all data products cost?
examples.businessTermsSales: What business terms are related to sales?
examples.showDataProducts: Show me data products in the Customer domain

messages.loadFailed: Failed to load LLM search. Please try again later.

copilot.title: Ask Ontos
copilot.subtitle: AI-powered assistant
copilot.welcomeDescription: Get help with modeling, mappings, product creation, and health insights. Try one of the suggested prompts below or type your own question.

prompts.modeling1: Help me define a vocabulary for our Retail Customer domain.
prompts.modeling2: What concepts should I create for a Supply Chain model?
prompts.modeling3: Explain the difference between a concept and a property.
prompts.mappings1: Suggest concepts for unmapped Finance tables.
prompts.mappings2: How do I map columns to semantic properties?
prompts.mappings3: Show me tables that need semantic mappings.
prompts.dataProducts1: Draft a Customer 360 data product from existing tables.
prompts.dataProducts2: What contracts should I create for my sales data?
prompts.dataProducts3: Help me package analytics tables as a data product.
prompts.healthGovernance1: Explain why semantic coverage dropped last week.
prompts.healthGovernance2: Show me data products with failing compliance checks.
prompts.healthGovernance3: What domains are ready for agent use?
